---
name: Submission help
about: My PR is failing CI or I'm not sure how to format my submission
title: "[help] "
labels: ["help wanted"]
---

## What are you trying to submit?

- [ ] An answer to one or more official testcases
- [ ] An answer to one or more community testcases
- [ ] A new community testcase
- [ ] Something else

## What went wrong?

<!-- Paste the CI error message, or describe what you tried. -->

## Have you checked?

- [ ] My answer folder is named exactly after my GitHub username (case-sensitive).
- [ ] My `<case>.log` has one `#RESPONSE N` / `#END N` pair per non-comment line in `requests.txt`.
- [ ] I did not modify any file directly under `official_testcase/<case>/` (only files inside my own subfolder).
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Links

<!-- Paste the failing PR URL if there is one. -->
